summary: PM review C189: Validated 3 completed tasks. TASK-141 (design event cards) scored 9/10 — approved for implementation. TASK-151 (dashboard) scored 6.5/10 — excellent UI but no backend API integration, needs follow-up TASK-151b. TASK-178 (usability plan) scored 6.5/10 — methodologically sound but premature at 6% Phase 2 completion. Identified 3 new scope gaps, 4 persistent carry-forward issues. Escalation required for Epic 16 stall (23+ cycles) and Epic 15 inactivation (23+ cycles).
